results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

test_cases.title: Create a new customer record with valid data
test_cases.objective: Verify that a new customer record can be created with valid name, email, and phone number.

steps.action: Click on the 'Create New Customer' button
steps.expected_result: The system navigates to the customer creation page

steps.action: Enter valid name, email, and phone number
steps.expected_result: The system creates a new customer record

test_cases.expected_result: A new customer record is created with valid data
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior, such as exact error messages.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

coverage_items.rationale: To ensure the system can handle valid customer data.
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

results.requirement_text: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

test_cases.title: Display active projects sorted by most recently updated first
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system displays a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first
preconditions: The system is logged in with a valid user account

steps.action: Navigate to the project list page

steps.expected_result: The projects are sorted by most recently updated first

test_cases.expected_result: The system displays a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first

traceability.coverage_item: Display active projects sorted by most recently updated first

source_basis: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior by specifying edge cases.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Display active projects sorted by most recently updated first
coverage_items.rationale: To ensure the list is sorted correctly
source_basis: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

results.requirement_text: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

test_cases.title: Update task status from open to completed
test_cases.objective: Verify that the task status can be updated from open to completed

steps.action: Click on the update status button
steps.expected_result: Task status is updated to completed

steps.action: Verify that the task status is displayed as completed
steps.expected_result: Task status is displayed as completed

test_cases.expected_result: Task status is updated to completed
source_basis: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior, such as error message text.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

coverage_items.rationale: The requirement specifies a specific action that the system must perform.
source_basis: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

test_cases.title: Search orders by order number - Positive
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system allows a user to search orders by order number.

steps.action: Enter a valid order number in the search field
steps.expected_result: The system displays the search results for the entered order number

steps.action: Enter an invalid order number in the search field
steps.expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating that the order number is invalid

test_cases.expected_result: The system allows a user to search orders by order number.
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior, such as an error message for a very long order number.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

coverage_items.rationale: To ensure the search functionality is working correctly.
source_basis: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

test_cases.title: Assign employee to department
test_cases.objective: Verify that a manager can assign an employee to a department.
preconditions: Employee is not assigned to a department

steps.action: Log in as a manager
steps.expected_result: Manager is logged in successfully

steps.action: Select an employee not assigned to a department
steps.expected_result: Employee is selected successfully

steps.action: Assign the selected employee to a department
steps.expected_result: Employee is assigned to the department successfully

test_cases.expected_result: Employee is assigned to the department successfully
source_basis: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior, such as an invalid department.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

coverage_items.rationale: The requirement specifies a positive action, so a positive test is necessary.
source_basis: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

results.requirement_text: The system shall show invoice details including invoice date, amount due, and payment status.

test_cases.title: Show invoice details
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system displays invoice details correctly.

steps.action: Navigate to the invoice details page
steps.expected_result: The invoice details page is displayed with the invoice date, amount due, and payment status.

steps.action: Verify that the invoice date is displayed correctly
steps.expected_result: The invoice date is displayed correctly.

test_cases.expected_result: The system displays invoice details correctly.
source_basis: The system shall show invoice details including invoice date, amount due, and payment status.

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents unsupported behavior by assuming the invoice has a payment status.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall show invoice details including invoice date, amount due, and payment status.

coverage_items.rationale: To ensure that the system displays the required invoice details.
source_basis: The system shall show invoice details including invoice date, amount due, and payment status.
